message:
Command `# Synthesis still working through the 176-item hazard3_decode decoder list
# Poll every 10 minutes
for i in $(seq 1 36); do
  sleep 600
  LINES=$(wc -l < /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log 2>/dev/null)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log 2>/dev/null)
  STEP=$(ls -t /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | librelane=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | last: $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "LibreLane finished!"; break; }
done` executed with exit code -1.

content:
Command: "# Synthesis still working through the 176-item hazard3_decode decoder list
# Poll every 10 minutes
for i in $(seq 1 36); do
  sleep 600
  LINES=$(wc -l < /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log 2>/dev/null)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log 2>/dev/null)
  STEP=$(ls -t /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | librelane=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | last: $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "LibreLane finished!"; break; }
done" timed out
